name: LMTI
author: Edgar Vu
project_full_name: LMTI — Long Memory / Project Intelligence Layer
naming_note: LMTI is the public product. ATLAS is a legacy/internal codename and Project Atlas artifact name. @atlas/* packages are internal implementation packages of LMTI during local alpha. The publish repository is vuthuanphat6-byte/lmti-atlas, not a private or legacy /atlas path.
ownership_note: Created and maintained by Edgar Vu — Cyno Software. LMTI is an independent AI-agent memory/context layer, not an application module.
description: LMTI is an independent layer attached to this repository to help AI agents understand project context, retrieve memory, index knowledge, capture lessons, and enforce safe operating boundaries. It is not a business module, runtime module, backend service, frontend feature, or product domain component.
agent_rules: Do not treat LMTI as a project feature module.
Do not move LMTI into src/modules, src/features, app, pages, components, services, or controllers.
Do not import LMTI into production runtime unless explicitly instructed.
Use LMTI only as an agent-support layer for context, memory, indexing, lessons, and guardrails.
Before modifying LMTI internals, verify the task explicitly asks for LMTI changes.
When working on the main project, do not refactor LMTI unless required.
allowed_interactions: store safe lessons after task completion
forbidden_interactions: deployment pipeline ownership unless explicitly configured
